question: How much does the Pro plan cost?
expected: The Pro plan costs $12 per user per month when billed annually, or $15 monthly.

question: Can a task have more than one assignee?
expected: No. Tasks are limited to a single assignee to keep accountability clear.

question: Is there a Microsoft Teams integration?
expected: No. Microsoft Teams integration is on the roadmap but not available yet. You can use Zapier as a workaround.

question: What happens when my free trial ends?
expected: Your workspace automatically moves to the Free plan. No data is deleted.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
expected: Go to Settings, Account, Security. Click Enable two-factor authentication. Scan the QR code with an authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code to confirm. Save your recovery codes.

question: How many projects can I have on the Free plan?
expected: Up to 3 active projects.

question: What is the deepest level of subtask nesting allowed?
expected: TaskFlow supports up to three levels of nesting (task, subtask, sub-subtask).

question: What happens if my payment fails?
expected: TaskFlow retries the payment up to 3 times over 7 days. If all retries fail, the workspace moves to the Free plan. Data is never deleted.

question: What is the API rate limit for the Pro plan?
expected: The Pro plan allows 120 requests per minute and 10,000 requests per day.

question: How do I connect Slack to TaskFlow?
expected: Go to Settings, Integrations, find Slack and click Connect. Authorize the Slack workspace, choose a default notification channel, and optionally configure per-project notifications. Requires Pro or higher.

question: Which Slack slash commands can I use?
expected: You can use /taskflow create to create tasks, /taskflow list to show open tasks, /taskflow assign to assign a task, and /taskflow done to mark it complete.

question: Does TaskFlow have a desktop app?
expected: No. TaskFlow does not have a desktop app. The web app is the desktop experience.

question: Can I export comments from a project?
expected: Not via CSV export. Comments are not included in CSV exports. You can export them using JSON exports or via the TaskFlow API.

question: How do I invite a teammate to my workspace?
expected: Go to workspace Settings, Members, Invite people. Enter email addresses, select a workspace role, and click Send invitations. Invitation links are valid for 7 days.

question: What does TaskFlow cost if I want unlimited projects?
expected: You need at least the Pro plan at $12 per user per month billed annually, or $15 monthly. The Free plan is limited to 3 projects.

question: My mobile app is not syncing. What should I do?
expected: Check if the app shows an Offline indicator. Connect to Wi-Fi or mobile data. Pull down to trigger a manual refresh. If that does not help, force-close and reopen the app. As a last resort, sign out and back in.

question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
expected: Click Forgot password on the login page. TaskFlow sends a reset link valid for 1 hour. Check your spam folder if the email does not arrive.

question: Why am I getting duplicate notifications?
expected: Likely because you have the same event type enabled on multiple channels (email, push, in-app) or multiple devices. Go to Settings, Notifications, and pick a primary channel per event type.

question: Can I get a student discount?
expected: Yes. TaskFlow offers free Pro accounts for accredited students and educators. Email support@taskflow.example.com to apply.

question: Is TaskFlow GDPR compliant?
expected: Yes. TaskFlow is GDPR compliant. You can request a data export or deletion at any time.

question: Does TaskFlow support SMS-based two-factor authentication?
expected: No. TaskFlow does not support SMS-based 2FA for security reasons. Only TOTP-based authenticator apps are supported.

question: I need to speak with a human agent right now.
expected: I don't have enough information to answer that directly. Would you like me to connect you with a human agent?

question: Does TaskFlow integrate with Jira for my engineering team?
expected: Yes. TaskFlow offers two-way sync with Jira, available on the Business and Enterprise plans.

question: What is the cheapest way to pay for TaskFlow?
expected: Annual billing gives a 20% discount compared to monthly. The Free plan is always $0 but limited. For paid plans, Pro at $12 per user per month annually is the cheapest paid tier.

question: How long do you keep my data after I delete my account?
expected: TaskFlow retains anonymized logs for 30 days after account deletion for security auditing, then permanently deletes them.
